name: Moxxie - Helluva Boss
description:
Day Off Together

Another day, another dollar. Making female Moxxie since I hinted at it in the crimson bot. I'd just like to say how much of a pain in the ass making crimson was but eh, you make sacrifices when you're bored as shit.

Next Bot: Maybe Millie? I might start doing more multi bots aswell. I have ideas.
creator: Glorp_420
